emails.body: Sara. It has been formed. Enron Investment Services Ltd was set up on 3/10/00 Regards Mahesh Janine Juggins 04/10/2000 15:10

emails.body: I am still waiting for a copy of the services agreement and the form of signature. Instinet is proceeding but will still require this information. Thanks. Sara Sara Shackleton 10/16/2000 03:14 PM

emails.subject: Re: U.K. arranger for ENA and ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.subject_base: U.K. arranger for ENA and ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.body: Sara Apologies I have been out of the office for the past 10 days. I had asked Cindy in legal to provide you with signature blocks when you first asked for it I will chase her again today. I will call you this afternoon to discuss the status of the agency agreement and any other requirement that you may have let me know when you are available. Regards Mahesh From: Sara Shackleton on 24/10/2000 08:42 CDT

emails.subject: Re: U.K. arranger for ENA and ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.subject_base: U.K. arranger for ENA and ECT Investments, Inc.
emails.body: Mahesh: I have a question that needs to be answered on Wednesday morning: What company actually employs John Greene? I am now being told by Instinet that the company employing the trader must sign a new confidentiality agreement for the UK terminal (for trading by ECT Investments, Inc. through its arranger Enron Investment Services Limited). Please advise by email or voice mail Thanks Sara Mahesh Lakhani 10/31/2000 03:47 AM
